body.title: Delete dead palace/ADC bootstrap scripts from scripts/ (+ their tests)
body.description:
**Problem:** Post single-package collapse, scripts/ at repo root still holds retired-lineage bootstrap scripts that target dead stores: palace_bootstrap.py (45 palace/psql refs), palace_cli.py (23), palace_seed_decisions.py (11), unified_node_adc_migration.py (one-time ADC migration), and search_index_bootstrap.py (creates the `adc.search_index` Postgres table — old ADC schema). The palace is retired (flat-file store is canonical) and none of these have non-test callers. They are root clutter that a future instance could mistake for live setup code.
**Proposed shape:** DELETE them — do NOT freeze-copy to ~/TheIgorsProject (Akien 2026-06-28: 'dead scripts are in the repo history; don't need extra copies laying around' — git history is the preservation, a freeze-copy would just be the shadow-dup we forbid). Delete the four palace/ADC scripts. For search_index_bootstrap.py: VERIFY-then-delete — confirm `adc.search_index` is dead schema with no live reader (grep for `search_index` table use across unseen_university/; the Librarian search path should not depend on it) before removing; if a live reader exists, keep it and note why. Delete the dedicated tests: tests/test_palace_bootstrap.py, tests/test_palace_cli.py, tests/test_palace_seed_decisions.py. tests/test_lab_designdocs_ref_sweep.py also references palace_seed_decisions — INSPECT it: if it tests broader ref-sweep behavior, EDIT out the dead reference rather than deleting the whole test; if it only tested the dead script, delete it.
**Affected files:** scripts/palace_bootstrap.py, scripts/palace_cli.py, scripts/palace_seed_decisions.py, scripts/unified_node_adc_migration.py, scripts/search_index_bootstrap.py (verify-first); tests/test_palace_bootstrap.py, tests/test_palace_cli.py, tests/test_palace_seed_decisions.py, tests/test_lab_designdocs_ref_sweep.py (edit-or-delete).
**Design rules:** no shadow duplicates / migrate(or retire)->VERIFY->delete (git history IS the archive — no freeze-copy); filesystem memory store is canonical (palace retired); CP1 honesty (verify search_index liveness, don't assume).
**Scope boundary:** IN — the five named dead scripts + their tests only. OUT — critic.py (separate ticket T-home-critic-cli-to-devlab), session_capture.py (T-fix-session-capture-flatfile), any live script. Do NOT touch scripts/ files not named here.
**Test plan:** (1) `ls scripts/` shows none of the five files. (2) `grep -rn 'adc\.palace\|adc\.search_index' scripts/` returns 0. (3) `pytest --collect-only -q` succeeds with 0 collection errors (no test imports a deleted script). (4) `git log --oneline -1 -- scripts/palace_cli.py` still resolves (history preserved, not rewritten).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Deleted 4 dead palace/ADC scripts (palace_bootstrap/cli/seed_decisions, unified_node_adc_migration) + 3 tests; trimmed stale allowlist entry (commit 2ac2d395). KEPT search_index_bootstrap.py (live DDL for adc.search_index — Librarian search depends on it). No live callers; collect-only clean (8368); ref-sweep failure pre-existing+identical at baseline.
body.unproven_reason: structural deletion: red is ImportError-shaped (collateral, rejected by proof_emitter) and the only non-circular guard (no scripts/ file writes adc.palace) stays red until T-fix-session-capture-flatfile lands; lever still lacking = a structural-removal proof mode (absence/no-caller assertion decoupled from assertion-red in-place inversion)
